summary: P1 Features Testing Complete. All 3 P1 tasks verified: 1) JWT token now has 30-day expiry (verified via token decode), 2) Trade Banner bathroom exclusive card with 50% badge linking to /shop/bathroom is present, 3) Admin localStorage key fixed from 'adminToken' to 'token' - Homepage Manager saves work without auth errors. BATHROOM nav link code is correct (/shop/bathroom) but navigation API returns test data overriding fallback.

issues: TEST LINK and TEST_SITEMAP_LINK items visible in navigation - test data from previous testing is stored in database and overriding the fallback navigation which correctly includes BATHROOM → /shop/bathroom
[TEST_SAVE_CHECK] placeholder text visible in hero description - appears to be test data

action_items: OPTIONAL: Clean up test navigation data from database to restore proper BATHROOM nav link visibility (code is correct, data issue)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features all working: 1) JWT 30-day expiry confirmed via token decode in pytest, 2) Trade CTA Banner has bathroom exclusive card with 50% badge linking to /shop/bathroom, 3) HomepageManager.jsx and BathroomPageAdmin.jsx now use localStorage.getItem('token') instead of 'adminToken' - admin can save changes without auth errors. Navigation bar shows test data (TEST LINK, TEST_SITEMAP_LINK) from database instead of fallback nav items - this is a data cleanup issue, not a code issue. The fallback navigation in TileStationHome.js line 111 correctly has BATHROOM → /shop/bathroom.
